title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXVI. Jingles.
content:
Hey! diddle, diddle,
            The cat and the fiddle,
        The cow jumped over the moon;
            The little dog laugh'd
            To see the sport,
        While the dish ran after the spoon.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCXXVI. Jingles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
